Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API 23 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Datasets for Reconstructing Visual Perception from Brain Data 26 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 113 upvotes, 21 comments
  4. Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework 148 upvotes, 35 comments
  5. Google Workspace CLI 845 upvotes, 269 comments
  6. Wikipedia in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 483 upvotes, 149 comments
  7. Building a new Flash 675 upvotes, 225 comments
  8. Google Safe Browsing missed 84% of confirmed phishing sites 205 upvotes, 60 comments
  9. Nvidia PersonaPlex 7B on Apple Silicon: Full-Duplex Speech-to-Speech in Swift 319 upvotes, 101 comments
  10. Jails for NetBSD – Kernel Enforced Isolation and Native Resource Control 87 upvotes, 22 comments
  11. GPT 5.4 Thinking and Pro 38 upvotes, 7 comments
  12. Poor Man's Polaroid 159 upvotes, 48 comments
  13. GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro 57 upvotes, 14 comments
  14. Apple: Enough Is Enough 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  15. The Government Uses Targeted Advertising to Track Your Location 96 upvotes, 30 comments
  16. The Brand Age 22 upvotes, 4 comments
  17. World-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite 125 upvotes, 48 comments
  18. Fast-Servers 69 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. Greg Kroah-Hartman Stretches Support Periods for Key Linux LTS Kernels 28 upvotes, 8 comments
  20. Smalltalk's Browser: Unbeatable, yet Not Enough 119 upvotes, 58 comments
  21. Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app 33 upvotes, 12 comments
  22. Good software knows when to stop 202 upvotes, 117 comments
  23. Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. Judge orders government to begin refunding more than $130B in tariffs 680 upvotes, 502 comments
  25. Intelligence is a commodity. Context is the real AI Moat 105 upvotes, 65 comments
  26. GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card 112 upvotes, 76 comments
  27. The Man Who Broke into Jail 50 upvotes, 31 comments
  28. AMD will bring its “Ryzen AI” processors to standard desktop PCs for first time 193 upvotes, 171 comments
  29. Relicensing with AI-Assisted Rewrite 328 upvotes, 330 comments
